find.match_belief: At the boundary between control and surrender lies the design: you set rules, the space responds.

profile.belief: Color budgets force honesty. You can't hide behind variety when you get five pigments and one idea.
profile.working_on: creating three-palette library system for nonprofits where every choice earns its space

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire for clarity and integrity, believing that limitations can inspire purposeful creativity in meaningful projects.
